hero.alt: Quickvoice AI-powered reminders and collections dashboard showing automated follow-ups and customer engagement metrics

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! This is a friendly reminder call from PrimeNest Realty... I’m your AI assistant, calling regarding your monthly rent payment.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, yes, what is it about?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Thank you for confirming. Our records show that your rent payment for this month is due tomorrow. I’m calling to remind you and assist if you need any help with the payment.

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Oh okay, I haven’t paid it yet.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: No worries at all. The total amount due is twenty five thousand rupees. You can make the payment via U P I, bank transfer, or card. Would you like me to send you the payment link now?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Done. I’ve sent the payment link to your WhatsApp and email. Would you like to complete the payment now, or should I set a reminder later today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’ll do it in the evening.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. I’ll schedule a gentle reminder for this evening at seven p.m. Before I go, do you have any questions regarding your rent or account?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great. Thank you for your time, and I appreciate your prompt response... Have a good day.
